'''βàöj-ch-h-d''' ('''kajachhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:majorise|majorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:majorise|majorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöj-ch-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajachhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijachedoko|thijachedoko]] || [[word:jijachedoko|jijachedoko]] || [[word:shijachedoko|shijachedoko]] || [[word:kijachedoko|kijachedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujachedoko|thuthujachedoko]] || [[word:jujujachedoko|jujujachedoko]] || [[word:shushujachedoko|shushujachedoko]] || [[word:kukujachedoko|kukujachedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujachedoko|thujachedoko]] || [[word:jujachedoko|jujachedoko]] || [[word:shujachedoko|shujachedoko]] || [[word:kujachedoko|kujachedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejachedoko|thejachedoko]] || [[word:jejachedoko|jejachedoko]] || [[word:shejachedoko|shejachedoko]] || [[word:kejachedoko|kejachedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojachedoko|thothojachedoko]] || [[word:jojojachedoko|jojojachedoko]] || [[word:shoshojachedoko|shoshojachedoko]] || [[word:kokojachedoko|kokojachedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojachedoko|thojachedoko]] || [[word:jojachedoko|jojachedoko]] || [[word:shojachedoko|shojachedoko]] || [[word:kojachedoko|kojachedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojachedoko|thojachedoko]] || [[word:jojachedoko|jojachedoko]] || [[word:shojachedoko|shojachedoko]] || [[word:kojachedoko|kojachedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠjachedoko|thΟΠjachedoko]] || [[word:jΟΠjachedoko|jΟΠjachedoko]] || [[word:shΟΠjachedoko|shΟΠjachedoko]] || [[word:kΟΠjachedoko|kΟΠjachedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajachedoko|thathajachedoko]] || [[word:jajajachedoko|jajajachedoko]] || [[word:shashajachedoko|shashajachedoko]] || [[word:kakajachedoko|kakajachedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajachedoko|thajachedoko]] || [[word:jajachedoko|jajachedoko]] || [[word:shajachedoko|shajachedoko]] || [[word:kajachedoko|kajachedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajachedoko|thajachedoko]] || [[word:jajachedoko|jajachedoko]] || [[word:shajachedoko|shajachedoko]] || [[word:kajachedoko|kajachedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajachedithi|shajachedithi]] || [[word:shajachediji|shajachediji]] || [[word:shajachedishi|shajachedishi]] || [[word:shajachediki|shajachediki]]
